notes.body: Daily Report catch-up — decide whether the opening or closing shift lead owns the daily report and lock it as the standing job. Fill any open days on the FG Daily Report xlsx (2065 Dixie).

Food Safety — Cyclosporiasis outbreak. Store-wide #1: veggie-wash tested + used on all produce, sanitize utensils/surfaces/dining/restrooms, wipe Freestyle, hand-wash + glove changes, temp checks + change sanitizer buckets. Drill at every shift meeting.
Bread delivery delay (2-hr). Keep a 1-day buffer. Check stock against today's forecast and flag if you need more.
Manager Certifications 2065 — all three passed: Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98. Temporary certificates issued; training videos fixed. Big bench-strength win.

Ticket 203045 (No Internet 5pm & 7pm temps / probe not reading) resolved and logged for Steritech. Watch the probe today — the 7/15 5PM temp came in incomplete (95%) on the outage. Closing Checklist + Milkshake Pump Check missed by Anthony Pirtle (PM).
